title: Springtown - The City of Blossoms
content: Springtown is a mid-sized city known for its extensive cherry blossom gardens and a historic observatory on the hill. The city has four distinct seasons, with spring being the most celebrated. Every year the Cherry Blossom Festival draws visitors from across the region. The park at the city center features a pond where koi fish swim among fallen petals. Luna often visits the observatory while Sakura prefers the riverside path lined with ancient cherry trees.
